one_time_description: Williams Treaty and Solar member disbursements including Williams Treaty Member Disbursements ($32,500), Williams Treaty Minor Disbursement ($915,140), Williams Treaty COVID-19 Member Disbursement ($1,064,586), and Solar Member Disbursement ($1,051,000)
economic_notes: Alderville Solar Limited Partnership (GBE) generated $599,301 income in 2023. Subsequent to year end, First Nation committed to purchasing 15 properties on and off reserve totaling $7.2 million. Williams Treaty Reconciliation Fund of $10,000,000 held for agreement among 7 Williams Treaty First Nations. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions received.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 — not 2024. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Alderville Solar Inc. and Alderville Community Development Corporation. One GBE: Alderville Solar Limited Partnership (ASLP), accounted for on modified equity basis. Prior year (2022) figures were restated due to prior period adjustment relating to building capital assets misclassified as land and assets previously expensed in error. New accounting standards adopted April 1, 2022 including PS3280 Asset Retirement Obligations resulting in $103,639 asbestos obligation. Significant Williams Treaty settlement distributions to members. Commitment of $7.2 million for 15 properties post year-end. Audit report signed April 24, 2025 — notably late. Expenses_housing reported as zero as housing is embedded in Lands/Members segment; Members expense of $3,063,226 is largely one-time Williams Treaty and Solar distributions. Salaries total not aggregated in statements provided.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
